content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table rows into table `J09C_temp` only for tours that start with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `J09C_temp`:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.

4. JOIN `J09C_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. JOIN the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09C`.
   Use exactly these column names in the export:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   File path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table rows into table `J09C_temp` only for tours that start with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `J09C_temp`:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.

4. JOIN `J09C_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. JOIN the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09C`.
   Use exactly these column names in the export:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   File path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE tour LIKE 'J09C%';

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM J09C_temp
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS AS HAUS, eablg.Installation AS ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID AS ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR AS EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1 AS HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
